text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh, is that—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey, Yaeno!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello. Are you two heading out somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well, actually...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Are you free right now, Yaeno? Would you care
to join us for some tea?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: We were just on our way back from the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
They wanted to check how our injuries are healing
up.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see. And what did they say?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm healing. However... it appears the day I can
return to the track is still rather distant.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I asked when I'll be able to race again, but the
doctor couldn't give me a straight answer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
There is no use in dwelling upon it. For now, we
need to focus on recovering until we are fit to run
again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ... It's not like anyone's waiting for me, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How can you say something like that?! Of course
they are!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But how many people are really going to
remember my name when I'm not racing?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The longer I'm off the track, the more distant a
memory I become.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What about me?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm here!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The three of us fought for the Classic Triple
Crown! If I continue racing...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Each time I run, everyone will remember you two
as well!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will save your places on the turf! As long as I run,
no one will forget about either of you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Yaeno...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, aren't you dependable?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The two of us will do our part and focus on our
recovery. Isn't that right, Chiyono O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Sorry for getting all mopey back there...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my best to heal up, so wait a little
longer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I will! For as long as it takes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I want to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki scores high in the popularity poll
for the Arima Kinen. When I ask her if she wants
to run in it, she answers yes without hesitation.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you'll be okay with the distance?
Are you sure you'll be okay with the distance?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is 2,500 meters, so I'm
concerned about her endurance.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I understand your concern, but I have made up
my mind.
choice_data_list: Is there a special reason you want to run there?
Is there a special reason you want to run there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's rare to see her insist on something like this, so
I can't help but ask.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Actually...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki tells me about her promise to keep
Sakura Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan alive in
people's hearts by competing herself.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is the culmination of the entire
year, so I thought that would make it the ultimate
place to refresh everyone's memories.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To be honest... without a strong obsession, I'm
not sure if I have what it takes to perform such a
big feat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I know that if I'm going to run, I must pour
every ounce of energy I have into it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm also thinking of the other racers I know will be
competing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As a Classic Triple Crown competitor, I have no
choice but to face them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands are packed with fans who have come
to witness the showdown between Tamamo Cross
and Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The air here is even more electric than at the
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's always a blessing to have an audience,
whatever the reason may be.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, Tamamo Cross! Show us your white
lightning today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Go get 'em, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
You're da strongest, Tamamo! Don't give 'em an
inch!

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
Go, Oguri Cap! Show everyone what you're made
of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: They sound like a raging storm.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (But I can't let it shake me. I must stay focused.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I have to put my worries aside and hone my
fierce blaze with the stillness of water.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's time!
